docs.title: Welcome to Docsy
docs.text: Docsy creates pull requests on documentation repositories.

docs.title: Install the Docsy Slack App
docs.text: Go to getdocsy.com. The website has a Slack button that you can use. After installation, add Docsy to channels by @-mentioning it.

docs.title: Install Docsy GitHub App
docs.text: Go to the Docsy GitHub App page and follow the instructions there. You will need to choose the repository that Docsy will need access to.

docs.title: Activate your Docsy license
docs.text: Share necessary information with us. We will activate your license and reach out to you.
